title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system enabling legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. The platform is built to leverage new model releases for significant capability improvements in legal document interpretation and case management.
